Class Grid

java.lang.Object
logic.board.Grid
public class Grid extends Object
Represents the main game board, managing the 2D spatial arrangement of Tiles and tracking all BaseUnits currently active in the game. This class handles coordinate validation, unit placement, and complex pathfinding operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Grid()
    Constructs a new Grid initialized with dimensions defined by BOARD_ROWS and BOARD_COLS from the global configuration.

  • Constructor Details

    • Grid

      public Grid()
      Constructs a new Grid initialized with dimensions defined by BOARD_ROWS and BOARD_COLS from the global configuration. Populates the grid with default tiles.

  • Method Details

    • placeUnit

      public boolean placeUnit(BaseUnit unit, int r, int c)
      Attempts to place a unit at the specified row and column coordinates. This method verifies bounds and tile occupancy before syncing the unit's position with the target tile.
      Parameters:
      unit - The BaseUnit to place on the board.
      r - The target row index.
      c - The target column index.
      Returns:
      true if the unit was successfully placed; false if the coordinates are invalid or the tile is already occupied/blocked.

    • isValidCoordinate

      public boolean isValidCoordinate(int r, int c)
      Checks if the given row and column indices fall within the bounds of the board.
      Parameters:
      r - The row index to check.
      c - The column index to check.
      Returns:
      true if the coordinates are within bounds; false otherwise.

    • getTile

      public Tile getTile(int r, int c)
      Retrieves the tile at the specified row and column coordinates.
      Parameters:
      r - The row index.
      c - The column index.
      Returns:
      The Tile at the specified location, or null if out of bounds.

    • getTile

      public Tile getTile(GridPoint position)
      Retrieves the tile at the specified grid point.
      Parameters:
      position - The GridPoint representing the target coordinates.
      Returns:
      The Tile at the specified location, or null if out of bounds.

    • getAllTiles

      public List<Tile> getAllTiles()
      Flattens the 2D tile array into a 1D list containing all tiles on the board.
      Returns:
      A list of all Tile objects on the grid.

    • getUnitsOnBoard

      public List<BaseUnit> getUnitsOnBoard()
      Retrieves a list of all units currently registered on the board.
      Returns:
      A list of all active BaseUnits.

    • getUnitsOnBoard

      public List<BaseUnit> getUnitsOnBoard(Team team)
      Retrieves a list of all non-obstacle units belonging to a specific team.
      Parameters:
      team - The Team to filter by.
      Returns:
      A list of BaseUnits belonging to the specified team.

    • getTownOnBoard

      public List<BaseUnit> getTownOnBoard()
      Retrieves a list of all units currently designated as "Towns" on the board.
      Returns:
      A list of BaseUnits representing towns.

    • getActiveUnits

      public List<BaseUnit> getActiveUnits(RoundPhase phase)
      Retrieves a list of all units that are eligible to act during the current phase. Filters out units that have already acted, belong to the wrong team, or are obstacles.
      Parameters:
      phase - The current RoundPhase determining which team is active.
      Returns:
      A list of active, ready-to-act BaseUnits.

    • getNumberOfUnitsOnBoard

      public int getNumberOfUnitsOnBoard()
      Gets the total count of all units (including obstacles and towns) on the board.
      Returns:
      The integer count of units.

    • getNumberOfUnitsOnBoard

      public int getNumberOfUnitsOnBoard(Team team)
      Gets the count of all non-obstacle units belonging to a specific team.
      Parameters:
      team - The Team to filter by.
      Returns:
      The integer count of the team's units.

    • getNumberOfTowns

      public int getNumberOfTowns()
      Gets the count of all active towns remaining on the board.
      Returns:
      The integer count of towns.

    • getNumberOfActiveUnits

      public int getNumberOfActiveUnits(RoundPhase phase)
      Gets the count of all units eligible to act in the current phase.
      Parameters:
      phase - The current RoundPhase.
      Returns:
      The integer count of active units.

    • getShortestPath

      public List<Tile> getShortestPath(BaseUnit unit, Tile startTile, Tile targetTile)
      Calculates the shortest movement path for a specific unit from a starting tile to a target tile. This method uses Dijkstra's algorithm to navigate the grid, factoring in terrain movement costs (e.g., water penalizes ground units) and the specific unit's movement type (e.g., flying, swimming).
      Parameters:
      unit - The BaseUnit attempting to move.
      startTile - The Tile where the movement originates.
      targetTile - The Tile the unit is trying to reach.
      Returns:
      An ordered list of Tiles representing the path from start to target. Returns an empty list if no valid path is found within the unit's movement range.
